choose.when: select id, title, intro as description, cover, null as url, level, status, create_by, create_time from osh_course where delete_flag = 0 and status = 0 order by create_time desc, id desc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}

select id, content as title, content as description, null as cover, null as url, level, status, create_by, create_time from osh_question_answer_question where delete_flag = 0 and status = 0 order by create_time desc, id desc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}

select id, content as title, content as description, null as cover, null as url, level, status, create_by, create_time from osh_question_answer_answer where delete_flag = 0 and status = 0 order by create_time desc, id desc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}

select id, title, description, cover, null as url, level, cast(status as signed) as status, create_by, create_time from osh_book where del_flag = '0' and status = '0' order by create_time desc, id desc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}

select id, tool_name as title, description, logo_url as cover, route_path as url, level, status, create_by, create_time from osh_tool where delete_flag = 0 and status = 0 order by create_time desc, id desc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}

select id, name as title, description, logo_url as cover, url, level, status, create_by, create_time from osh_practical_website where delete_flag = 0 and status = 0 order by create_time desc, id desc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}
choose.otherwise: select null as id, null as title, null as description, null as cover, null as url, null as level, null as status, null as create_by, null as create_time where 1 = 0

choose.when: select count(1) from osh_course where delete_flag = 0 and status = 0
select count(1) from osh_question_answer_question where delete_flag = 0 and status = 0
select count(1) from osh_question_answer_answer where delete_flag = 0 and status = 0
select count(1) from osh_book where del_flag = '0' and status = '0'
select count(1) from osh_tool where delete_flag = 0 and status = 0
select count(1) from osh_practical_website where delete_flag = 0 and status = 0
update osh_course set status = 2, update_by = #{operator}, update_time = now() where id = #{resourceId} and delete_flag = 0 and status = 0
update osh_question_answer_question set status = 1, update_by = #{operatorId}, update_time = now() where id = #{resourceId} and delete_flag = 0 and status = 0
update osh_question_answer_answer set status = 1, update_by = #{operatorId}, update_time = now() where id = #{resourceId} and delete_flag = 0 and status = 0
update osh_book set status = '1', update_by = #{operator}, update_time = now() where id = #{resourceId} and del_flag = '0' and status = '0'
update osh_tool set status = 1, update_by = #{operator}, update_time = now() where id = #{resourceId} and delete_flag = 0 and status = 0
update osh_practical_website set status = 1, audit_by = #{operator}, audit_time = now(), update_by = #{operator}, update_time = now() where id = #{resourceId} and delete_flag = 0 and status = 0
choose.otherwise: update osh_tool set status = status where 1 = 0
